label: Neutrophil1
evidence: The label 'Neutrophil1' is used by the authors in the cell type annotations of the prenatal skin atlas (Gopee et al., 2024, doi:10.1038/s41586-024-08002-x). Two neutrophil populations (Neutrophil1 and Neutrophil2) are identified in fetal skin, within the broad 'Neutrophil' category. The specific marker genes distinguishing Neutrophil1 from Neutrophil2 are provided in the supplementary tables.
